LanguageData.RatBaby_LetterBase: A Ratkin baby, {PAWN_nameDef}, has been found at the edge of the colony. Whoever brought the child here left no explanation, only a hurried trail leading back into the wild.
LanguageData.RatBaby_LetterDeadMother: A dead Ratkin mother lies beside {PAWN_nameDef}. It looks as if she dragged herself here to leave the baby with the only people she thought might help.
LanguageData.RatBaby_LetterInjuredMother: A badly injured Ratkin mother has collapsed near {PAWN_nameDef}. She is alive, barely, and seems to have come here to entrust the baby to your colony.
LanguageData.RatBaby_LetterMouseGuardian: A large domesticated rat is circling protectively around {PAWN_nameDef}. Somehow, the animal stayed with the baby all the way to your colony.
